# kCTFontFeatureSelectorIdentifierKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontFeatureSelectorIdentifierKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeatureselectoridentifierkey)

-  kCTFontFeatureSelectorIdentifierKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFeatureSelectorIdentifierKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFeatureSelectorIdentifierKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeatureselectoridentifierkey#Discussion)

Key to be used with a selector dictionary corresponding to a feature type to obtain the selector identifier value as a `CFNumberRef` object.
